description: Optical ops MCP for AI DCs — gNMI, ML RUL, Digital Twin, NCCL, SPARQL semantic
name: io.github.liveplex-cpu/fiber

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the FIBER deployment (e.g., https://api.fiber.ac or http://localhost:8000 for self-hosted).
environmentVariables.name: FIBER_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the FIBER API. Role determines which tools work: viewer (24 read tools), operator (+write), admin (all).
environmentVariables.name: FIBER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to expose write tools: demo trigger, NCCL ingest, RMA create. Defaults to read-only for safety.
environmentVariables.name: FIBER_ENABLE_WRITE

environmentVariables.description: (v1.0.2) Optional CSV of tool names. When set, only these tools are exposed — letting operators scope autonomous agents to a minimum surface (e.g. 'fiber_health,fiber_cluster_overview,fiber_list_alerts'). Empty = all tools exposed (default).
environmentVariables.name: FIBER_MCP_TOOLS_ALLOWLIST

environmentVariables.description: Per-request HTTP timeout in seconds. Increase if running Digital Twin Monte Carlo with iterations>1000.
environmentVariables.name: FIBER_HTTP_TIMEOUT
